component.name: KRUDD Editor
component.summary: Native editor for the KRUDD game engine

description.p: KRUDD Editor is the native desktop shell for the KRUDD game engine — the same C engine that ships to the browser as WebAssembly, running natively on a Vulkan backend and presenting into a real desktop window.

This is an early proof-of-life build: the editor boots the engine's render cluster (asset, entity, frame graph, scene renderer) and brings up a validated Vulkan 1.3 device, but it presents an animated clear rather than a full scene. Translating the engine's draw stream to Vulkan so the demo scene renders is the next step.
First packaged Flatpak of the native Qt editor shell: QMainWindow with Scene/Inspector/Assets/Console docks around a Vulkan viewport.
